message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'vgem_dmamove_token_free' sets signal field 'dmamove_token_slot.generation', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=dmamove_token_slot;field=generation;offset=12] [oracle:assert=dmamove_token_slot.generation stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets generation without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
